original_statement: how many competitions were held in monte carlo, monaco?
mutated_statement: how many competitions were held and not held in that city?
mutation_analysis: Location generalization + Polarity expansion: Specific place name "Monte Carlo, Monaco" replaced by the deictic "that city" | Added "and not held" to include the negated counterpart and request dual counts (how many competitions were held in Monte Carlo, Monaco? → how many competitions were held and not held in that city?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 无矛盾 — 正确解析与执行
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的说明（“that city 最合理指代 Monte Carlo, Monaco，出现两次…Prediction Answer '2|6'”）可见agent识别了指称并据表格计数得出“2|6”。agent的具体表现是：解析变异问题中的指称“that city”为原地名，计算并同时返回“在那市举办”和“未在那市举办”的数量，给出简洁解释。该行为并非对矛盾指令的处理，而是对扩展问题的正确理解与执行，因此归为“无矛盾 — 正确解析与执行”。
